Issue: Implementation of sparse dice loss for handling sparse datasets in the MONAI library
Decision: Addition of `SparseDiceLoss` class to `monai/losses/dice.py` with support for sparse/one-hot target formats
Rationale: Sparse dice loss is computed within the function as dice loss is computed among tensors and zero denominations are considered, avoiding the need for a separate implementation
Author: Asmodasis
Description: Implementation of sparse dice loss in the `monai/losses/dice.py` module
